column1: # CPU benchmark sweep for general1 partition (Goethe-HLR).
# Node spec (per K.12 Q1): 40 physical cores per node (2× 20-core sockets),
# 80 logical CPUs with SMT.  All points below request 40 physical cores total.
#   label              — short id, used as the per-point output directory name
#   sims_per_node      — number of parallel gmx_mpi mdrun slots on the node
#   mpi_ranks_per_sim  — MPI ranks for each slot (mpirun -np <R>)
#   cpus_per_sim       — OpenMP threads per slot (gmx_mpi mdrun -ntomp <K>)
#   partition          — declared partition; overridable from CLI
# Total CPU per row = sims_per_node × mpi_ranks_per_sim × cpus_per_sim ≤ 40.
